title: Type This Into Claude, It'll Make You Build 10x Faster.
summary: Austin Marchese presents six specific phrases to type into Claude Code that allegedly accelerate project development by 10x. The approach emphasizes particular prompting patterns endorsed by Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, alongside a cautionary anti-pattern that he claims most users misuse.
writeup: Austin Marchese walks through six specific phrases to type into Claude Code, framing them as prompting patterns that speed project development. The video grounds these patterns in endorsements from Claude Code's creator and Andrej Karpathy, and it flags one cautionary anti-pattern that Marchese says most users get wrong. The takeaway is a concrete set of prompts to apply directly in Claude Code, plus the mistake to avoid.
